title: Mineral Exploiter Gamma
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Mineral Exploiter Gamma''''' referred to one of four [[Automated Mineral Exploiter]]s belonging to the [[Orko SkyMine Asteroid Processing Corporation]], under the direction of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Durga Besadii Tai]], for use in [[Mining/Legends|mining]] the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]
